positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic mountain lion silhouette leaping gracefully over stylized flowers and tropical foliage. The scene should feature clean, bold lines and strong black silhouettes against a bright, solid teal background. Incorporate elements of Art Deco and tribal geometry into the floral patterns and background fill. High contrast, minimalist yet ornate, perfect for screen printing. Composition should be centered and vertically appealing. Flat vector style, graphic novel aesthetic, pop art colors (teal, burnt orange, yellow mustard), highly detailed linework, isolated subject matter, apparel design.
negative: photorealistic, 3D render, grayscale, blur, text, logo, signature, watermark, artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, low detail, dirty, messy background
